data.title: Bank of South Carolina Corp. reported Q3 earnings of $2,143,640, an increase of 18.97% from Q3 2024, with total nine-month earnings at $5,893,809 - a 19.51% increase from the same period last year. Annualized returns on assets and equity also showed improvement. CEO credited strong margin, fee income, and expense management for the record earnings, also raising cash dividend for the third time in twelve months.
data.description: The Bank of South Carolina Corporation reported unaudited earnings of $2,143,640, or $0.40 basic and $0.38 diluted earnings per share, for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, showing an 18.97% increase from the same period in 2024. For the nine months ended September 30, 2025, earnings increased by 19.51% to $5,893,809 compared to the previous year. Annualized returns on average assets and equity improved to 1.37% and 14.03% respectively. President and CEO Eugene H. Walpole stated that strong net interest margin, steady fee income, and expense management led to these results. The company raised the cash dividend for the second consecutive quarter, highlighting a successful year. Total interest and fee income rose to $7,317,405 for the quarter. The full story is on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Flyntlok gets $36M investment from Mainsail Partners to enhance AI for heavy equipment dealers in Alaska.
data.description: Alaska-based Flyntlok, a company offering a cloud-based DMS for heavy equipment dealers, has disclosed a significant development. Mainsail Partners has committed a substantial investment of $36 million in Flyntlok for its growth. This investment is aimed at supporting Flyntlok's expansion and further development of their DMS platform.

data.title: Neumont College of Computer Science becomes Neumont University to reflect growth and commitment to next-gen students.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, on October 9, 2025, Neumont College of Computer Science revealed its transition to Neumont University. This change signifies the institution's expansion in academic offerings and ongoing dedication to shaping the future workforce. The rebranding aligns with the university's evolution and advancement, aiming to equip students for success in the ever-changing tech landscape.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures up with Nvidia & Taiwan Semi sales rising, Delta Air earnings strong. Markets optimistic.
data.description: Strong sales were reported by Taiwan Semiconductor following a boost in the S&P 500 by Nvidia CEO Huang. Delta Air also saw a rise in earnings. Post-Dow Jones futures indicate a rise, with Taiwan Semiconductor's sales and Delta Air's earnings displaying strength.

data.title: NeOnc's NuroMENA signs MSA with IROS, expands board of directors in Middle East venture.
data.description: NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NTHI), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on CNS cancers, recently shared significant updates to its Middle East expansion plans. Through its subsidiary, NuroMENA Holdings Ltd., the company has entered a Master Services Agreement (MSA) with Insights Research Organization and Solutions (IROS), a UAE-based contract research organization under the M42 group. This move signifies NeOnc's commitment to advancing therapies for CNS cancers in the region. The MSA aims to leverage the expertise of IROS, a company powered by AI, technology, and genomics, to support NeOnc's clinical-stage developments.

data.title: CCSC Technology to build new supply chain management center in Central Europe with Konstruktor Group in Serbia. Strengthening logistics and manufacturing infrastructure.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, CCSC Technology International Holdings Limited, a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CCTG and based in Hong Kong, announced that its subsidiary CCSC Technology Serbia has signed an MOU with Konstruktor Group, a construction company in Serbia. This agreement aims to facilitate the construction of a new European supply chain management center in the Municipality of Merosina, Republic of Serbia. The center will bolster CCSC's logistics and manufacturing infrastructure in Central Europe.

data.title: KNOREX CEO discusses recent NYSE American listing and business outlook for leading AI-driven advertising provider.
data.description: On October 9th, 2025, KNOREX Ltd. (NYSE American: KNRX), a top provider of AI-powered programmatic online advertising products, released a letter to shareholders from CEO Justin Choo. The company operates in Sunnyvale and Singapore, showcasing its global presence.

data.title: Arqit Quantum Inc. reports select preliminary financial results for second half and full fiscal year 2025.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, a leading company in quantum-safe encryption, Arqit Quantum Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQQ, ARQQW), disclosed key financial insights for the second half and entirety of the fiscal year 2025 from London.

data.title: Kratos marks 25 years of triumph with Oriole Solid Rocket Motor, a flagship achievement in its journey.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4%, down from 5.5% last year. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant rise, with the main index increasing by 10% in the last quarter. Experts predict further growth in the upcoming months due to positive consumer spending trends and increased business investments. The government has announced plans to implement new policies to sustain this economic growth and create more employment opportunities.

data.title: Signing Day Sports introduces tech for college basketball recruitment, holds first combine with  Thurl Bailey.
data.description: Thurl Bailey, a former NBA star, recently co-hosted the inaugural Combine event. The event brought together aspiring basketball players to showcase their skills and abilities. The Combine attracted over 200 participants, ranging from high school prospects to seasoned veterans. Bailey guided the players through various drills and evaluations to assess their potential. The event aimed to provide a platform for players to gain exposure and opportunities in the basketball world. Bailey's presence added valuable insights and expertise to the Combine, creating a unique and impactful experience for all involved.

data.title: Chatham Lodging Trust schedules Q3 earnings call for November 5, 2025, in West Palm Beach, Florida.
data.description: Chatham Lodging Trust has scheduled its earnings call for the third quarter of 2025, which will take place on Wednesday, November 5. The call is expected to provide insights into the financial performance of the company during this period. Investors and stakeholders are anticipated to receive important updates and key figures regarding the trust's earnings and operations. This event presents an opportunity for individuals to gain a better understanding of Chatham Lodging Trust's financial standing and future prospects.

data.title: Motive, a global AI leader, opens new office in Austin, Texas, plans to hire 200+ employees in 2 years.
data.description: AI-driven Integrated Operations Platform Motive has recently inaugurated its new office in Austin, Texas, signaling a strategic move to support its expanding sales team. This office will cater to clients in Texas, nationwide, and globally. The company plans to bolster its workforce with over 200 full-time employees in the Austin metro area over the next two years. Recruitment will focus on various departments including R&D, sales operations, and recruitment to meet the growing demands of the business.
